textPlain: Some amazing ideas here, definitely inspiring.The trees right up against the above-ground structures make me weep for defensible space. While the underground structures may be survivable in the event of a wildfire and the trees are beautiful I'd be happier seeing a property that feels more survivable in the types of fires we've been seeing in California.
Kirsten did a nice job on Forestiere Gardens in Fresno, CA.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mUKRPoQKynk
Saving to finish watching later this is super cool
I've watched this probably 5 times since it was released. It's all-the-way-around incredible.
